meaning: n.(修道院,学院等处的)食堂,餐厅
examples: The Refectory is one of the finest restaurants in Columbus, Ohio.
The alfresco dining in the refectory has been particularly well received, as has the new gym and sauna.
The stereotypical village green and church tower overlook the Primary School Refectory built in 1609 by Edmond Gibbons.
And then, to honor the solemnity at the evening supper, a quart decanter of claret was on each refectory table in addition to the usual pitcher of ale.
